## Meeting Purpose

[To align on Datagrid's product messaging for marketing and sales.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Target Heavy Industry:** Datagrid's core value is handling massive, complex datasets (e.g., construction drawings) that general-purpose AI tools "choke on."](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [**Focus on Quality, Not Cost:** The value proposition is superior accuracy and sophisticated task completion, not lower token costs.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Highlight Verification:** Datagrid's in-context citations cut answer verification time by \~60% (e.g., 5 mins to 2 mins vs. Perplexity).](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Empower Experts:** The key adoption strategy is enabling experienced managers, not just young tech graduates, to build agents.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)

## Topics

### Core Value Proposition: Heavy Industry

  - [Datagrid's strength is processing large, complex datasets that general-purpose AI tools cannot handle.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [**Hallucination Resistance:** In-context citations link directly to source data, enabling rapid verification.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Metric:** Verification time cut by \~60% (e.g., 5 mins to 2 mins vs. Perplexity).](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Advanced Data Handling:**](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [**Image Processing:** Custom visual language models (VLMs) enable detailed analysis of complex diagrams (e.g., comparing construction drawing revisions).](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [**Video Analysis:** Extracts actions and details from job site videos for automated action.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

### Product Manager (PM) Use Case

  - [**Software Focus:** Currently integrates with Notion, not Jira.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [**Value Prop:** Delivers better, more detailed outputs than a time-constrained PM could write manually.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [**Workflow Automation:** Enables chained actions (e.g., Notion ticket → Slack notification) to eliminate context switching.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [**Personalization:** Agents learn user preferences for ticket formatting, with user control to delete memories.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)

### Agent Designer Value Proposition

  - [**Problem:** Building agents from scratch is slow due to the need to build data ingestion, enrichment, and tool frameworks.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [**Solution:** Datagrid provides a 5-year-old data pipeline foundation and a library of pre-built tools, cutting years off development.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [**Open API:** Allows full white-labeling and custom tool development, giving technical users control.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)

### Agent Evaluation & Quality Control

  - [**Process:** Combines human review with "LLM as a judge."](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
      - [**LLM as a judge:** An LLM compares agent outputs against a suite of \>1,000 industry-specific test cases to ensure quality at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [**Real-time Monitoring:** Agents self-score their performance after each action.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
  - [**Self-Correction:** Agents remember successful steps to improve speed on future runs.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)

### Key Differentiators & Messaging

  - [**Human-in-the-Loop:** Shows a preview of agent actions before they are executed in connected systems, building trust and preventing errors.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [**Security:** SOC2 compliant, working toward FedRAMP.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [**Adoption Strategy:** Frame agent building as a skill for experienced managers, not just young tech graduates.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
      - [**Example:** A 50-something welder built an agent that cut project spec evaluation from 3 days to 4 hours.](https://fathom.video/share/FSVL1seV2zPsFftyqy5mtJeqPLbk6hQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
